name: Vinati Organics Limited
summary: Vinati Organics Limited is a manufacturer of specialty chemical and organic intermediates, including IBB (Iso Butyl Benzene) and ATBS (Acrylamido tertiary Butane Sulfonic Acid). The company's products are used in various industries such as pharmaceuticals, polymers, and cosmetics. Vinati Organics is based in Mumbai, India.
